title: calystegia macrostegia subsp. arida
intro: Calystegia macrostegia subsp. arida, also known as Island Morning Glory, is a perennial vine native to the Channel Islands off the coast of California. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Calystegia macrostegia subsp. arida include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and soothe the nervous system.
